topics.title: Configure Adobe Experience Manager
topics.description: Fundamental AEM settings configuration, troubleshooting AEM issues, OSGi configuration. Exam weight: 18%.

subtopics.title: OSGi Configuration Management
subtopics.description: Understanding OSGi framework configuration in AEM, including factory configs, run modes, and the Felix console.

subtopics.title: OSGi Factory Configurations
subtopics.description: Creating and managing factory configurations for multi-instance services. Includes naming conventions, PID patterns, and configuration targeting.

subtopics.title: Run Modes and Configuration Resolution
subtopics.description: Configuring run modes (author, publish, dev, stage, prod) and understanding configuration resolution order. Includes install folder hierarchy.

subtopics.title: Configuration Admin Service
subtopics.description: Using the OSGi Configuration Admin service for programmatic configuration management. Includes ConfigurationAdmin API and ManagedService patterns.

subtopics.title: Sling Framework Configuration
subtopics.description: Configuring Sling Models, resource resolution, and servlet mapping in AEM.

subtopics.title: Sling Models Configuration
subtopics.description: Implementing and configuring Sling Models for component backing. Includes @Model annotations, injectors, and adaptables.

subtopics.title: Resource Resolver Configuration
subtopics.description: Configuring resource resolver mappings, vanity URLs, and resource resolution order. Includes sling:mapping and resolver factory settings.

subtopics.title: AEM Troubleshooting
subtopics.description: Diagnosing and resolving common AEM configuration and runtime issues.

subtopics.title: Logging Configuration and Analysis
subtopics.description: Configuring Sling logging levels, log rotation, and analyzing error.log, request.log, and access.log for troubleshooting.

subtopics.title: Common AEM Issues and Resolutions
subtopics.description: Identifying and resolving common issues: repository inconsistencies, bundle failures, service unavailability, and memory issues.

topics.title: Operate Cloud Manager and Cloud Manager API
topics.description: Cloud Manager environment settings, program and environment provisioning, AEMaaCS migration strategies, Adobe I/O integration. Exam weight: 20%.

subtopics.title: Cloud Manager Environment Management
subtopics.description: Managing environments through Cloud Manager UI, including creation, configuration, and lifecycle management.

subtopics.title: Environment Provisioning
subtopics.description: Creating and provisioning dev, stage, and production environments. Includes environment types, regions, and resource allocation.

subtopics.title: Environment Variables Configuration
subtopics.description: Managing environment-specific variables and secrets in Cloud Manager. Includes OSGi env vars, Cloud Manager variables, and secret handling.

subtopics.title: Advanced Networking Configuration
subtopics.description: Configuring VPN, dedicated egress IP, and flexible port egress for AEM as a Cloud Service environments.

subtopics.title: Program Management
subtopics.description: Creating and managing Cloud Manager programs, including sandbox and production programs.

subtopics.title: Program Types and Lifecycle
subtopics.description: Understanding sandbox vs production programs, program creation, hibernation policies, and deletion procedures.

subtopics.title: Solution Configuration
subtopics.description: Enabling AEM Sites, Assets, Forms, and Screens solutions within programs. Includes add-on provisioning.

subtopics.title: Cloud Manager API and Adobe I/O
subtopics.description: Programmatic access to Cloud Manager via REST APIs and Adobe I/O integration.

subtopics.title: Adobe I/O Authentication Setup
subtopics.description: Configuring Adobe I/O projects for Cloud Manager API access. Includes JWT authentication, service accounts, and OAuth setup.

subtopics.title: Cloud Manager API Endpoints
subtopics.description: Using Cloud Manager REST APIs for pipelines, environments, and deployments. Includes common API operations and response handling.

subtopics.title: AEM as a Cloud Service Migration
subtopics.description: Strategies and tools for migrating from AEM 6.x to AEM as a Cloud Service.

subtopics.title: Migration Assessment Tools
subtopics.description: Using Best Practices Analyzer, Cloud Acceleration Manager, and Repository Modernizer for migration readiness assessment.

subtopics.title: Content Transfer Tool
subtopics.description: Planning and executing content migration using Content Transfer Tool. Includes extraction, ingestion, and validation phases.

subtopics.title: Code Refactoring for AEMaaCS
subtopics.description: Refactoring custom code for cloud compatibility. Includes removing deprecated APIs, mutable vs immutable content, and index management.

topics.title: Configure the Web Proxy Infrastructure
topics.description: Dispatcher configuration management, caching troubleshooting, TTL and invalidation strategies. Exam weight: 12%.

subtopics.title: Dispatcher Configuration
subtopics.description: Configuring Dispatcher files including dispatcher.any, farm files, filters, and rules.

subtopics.title: Dispatcher Farm Configuration
subtopics.description: Configuring farm files including renders, filters, cache rules, and virtual hosts. Includes multi-farm setups.

subtopics.title: Dispatcher Filters and Rules
subtopics.description: Creating filter rules for request blocking and allowing. Includes glob patterns, deny/allow precedence, and security filters.

subtopics.title: URL Rewrite Rules
subtopics.description: Configuring Apache mod_rewrite rules for URL manipulation. Includes rewrites for vanity URLs, canonicalization, and redirects.

subtopics.title: Dispatcher Caching
subtopics.description: Understanding and optimizing Dispatcher cache behavior for performance.

subtopics.title: TTL and Cache Headers
subtopics.description: Configuring cache TTL via Dispatcher, AEM, and CDN. Includes Cache-Control headers, Surrogate-Control, and stale-while-revalidate.

subtopics.title: Cache Invalidation Strategies
subtopics.description: Implementing cache invalidation via flush agents, stat files, and auto-invalidation. Includes graceful invalidation patterns.

subtopics.title: Cache Troubleshooting
subtopics.description: Diagnosing cache misses, debugging Dispatcher cache issues, and analyzing X-Dispatcher headers.

subtopics.title: Dispatcher in AEM as a Cloud Service
subtopics.description: Cloud-specific Dispatcher configuration and deployment patterns.

subtopics.title: Immutable Dispatcher Configuration
subtopics.description: Understanding immutable vs mutable Dispatcher files in AEMaaCS. Includes configuration structure and deployment via Cloud Manager.

subtopics.title: Local Dispatcher Validation
subtopics.description: Using Dispatcher SDK and validator tools for local testing before deployment. Includes Docker-based validation.

topics.title: Build and Deployments
topics.description: Cloud Manager deployment management, pipeline analysis, content package management, Maven project configuration. Exam weight: 28%.

subtopics.title: Cloud Manager Pipelines
subtopics.description: Configuring and managing CI/CD pipelines in Cloud Manager.

subtopics.title: Pipeline Types and Configuration
subtopics.description: Understanding production, non-production, and config-only pipelines. Includes pipeline triggers, scheduling, and branch configuration.

subtopics.title: Code Quality Gates
subtopics.description: Understanding SonarQube code quality checks, custom quality rules, and quality gate thresholds. Includes security scanning.

subtopics.title: Build Phase Analysis
subtopics.description: Analyzing build phase logs, troubleshooting Maven build failures, and optimizing build times.

subtopics.title: Deployment Phase and Strategies
subtopics.description: Understanding deployment phases, rolling deployments, and deployment failure analysis. Includes rollback procedures.

subtopics.title: Content Package Management
subtopics.description: Creating, managing, and deploying content packages across AEM instances.

subtopics.title: Package Structure and Filters
subtopics.description: Defining package filters, understanding package structure, and managing filter.xml for content packaging.

subtopics.title: Mutable vs Immutable Content
subtopics.description: Understanding content mutability in AEMaaCS, separating mutable and immutable content, and repoinit scripts.

subtopics.title: Package Dependencies and Ordering
subtopics.description: Managing package dependencies, install order, and package embedding strategies.

subtopics.title: Maven Project Configuration
subtopics.description: Configuring Maven projects for AEM development and Cloud Manager pipelines.

subtopics.title: AEM Project Archetype
subtopics.description: Using the AEM Project Archetype for project setup. Includes archetype versions, configuration options, and module structure.

subtopics.title: Maven Profiles for Environments
subtopics.description: Configuring Maven profiles for different environments (local, dev, stage, prod). Includes profile activation and variable substitution.

subtopics.title: AEM Maven Plugins
subtopics.description: Using filevault-package-maven-plugin, content-package-maven-plugin, and frontend-maven-plugin. Includes plugin configuration.

subtopics.title: Cloud Manager Maven Requirements
subtopics.description: Ensuring Maven projects meet Cloud Manager build requirements. Includes required pom.xml settings, Java versions, and Node.js configuration.

subtopics.title: Frontend Pipeline
subtopics.description: Managing frontend assets and the dedicated frontend pipeline.

subtopics.title: Frontend Module Structure
subtopics.description: Organizing the ui.frontend module, webpack configuration, and clientlib generation.

subtopics.title: Frontend Pipeline Configuration
subtopics.description: Configuring and running the dedicated frontend pipeline for rapid CSS/JS deployments without full-stack builds.

topics.title: Monitor and Report on Quality Metrics
topics.description: Performance metrics collection, New Relic integration, log analysis, health checks, infrastructure scaling. Exam weight: 14%.

subtopics.title: Performance Monitoring
subtopics.description: Collecting and analyzing performance metrics in AEM environments.

subtopics.title: New Relic Integration
subtopics.description: Configuring New Relic APM for AEM as a Cloud Service. Includes dashboards, alerting, and transaction tracing.

subtopics.title: AEM Health Checks
subtopics.description: Using Sling Health Checks for system monitoring. Includes OOTB health checks, custom health checks, and health check tags.

subtopics.title: JMX and MBean Monitoring
subtopics.description: Accessing JMX MBeans for runtime monitoring. Includes memory usage, thread pools, and repository statistics.

subtopics.title: Log Analysis and Management
subtopics.description: Accessing, analyzing, and managing logs in AEM environments.

subtopics.title: AEM Log Types and Locations
subtopics.description: Understanding error.log, request.log, access.log, and audit.log. Includes log file locations in AEMaaCS.

subtopics.title: Accessing Logs via Cloud Manager
subtopics.description: Downloading and streaming logs through Cloud Manager UI and API. Includes log forwarding to external systems.

subtopics.title: Log Forwarding and Splunk Integration
subtopics.description: Configuring log forwarding to Splunk, Azure Log Analytics, or other SIEM tools from AEM as a Cloud Service.

subtopics.title: Infrastructure Scaling
subtopics.description: Understanding and managing scaling strategies in AEM as a Cloud Service.

subtopics.title: Autoscaling Behavior
subtopics.description: Understanding AEMaaCS autoscaling triggers, scaling policies, and instance scaling for publish and author tiers.

subtopics.title: CDN and Load Balancing
subtopics.description: Configuring CDN (Fastly) settings, origin shields, and understanding load balancing in the AEMaaCS architecture.

topics.title: Operate the Admin Console
topics.description: Support request submission, federated SSO configuration, AEM user and group sync with IMS, SAML, LDAP. Exam weight: 8%.

subtopics.title: Admin Console Support Operations
subtopics.description: Using Adobe Admin Console for support and administrative tasks.

subtopics.title: Support Ticket Submission
subtopics.description: Creating and managing support tickets through Adobe Admin Console. Includes severity levels, escalation, and case management.

subtopics.title: System Status and Notifications
subtopics.description: Monitoring Adobe system status, subscribing to notifications, and understanding maintenance windows.

subtopics.title: Identity and Access Management
subtopics.description: Configuring identity providers and user synchronization for AEM.

subtopics.title: Adobe IMS Integration
subtopics.description: Understanding Adobe Identity Management System integration with AEM. Includes IMS authentication flow and user provisioning.

subtopics.title: Federated SSO Configuration
subtopics.description: Configuring federated identity with enterprise identity providers. Includes SAML 2.0 setup, certificate management, and attribute mapping.

subtopics.title: User and Group Synchronization
subtopics.description: Synchronizing users and groups between Admin Console and AEM. Includes product profiles, user groups, and permission mapping.

subtopics.title: LDAP Integration (On-Premise)
subtopics.description: Configuring LDAP authentication for AEM on-premise deployments. Includes LDAP handler configuration and group sync. Note: Limited applicability in AEMaaCS.
